vulnerability.reference: Watermark key can be inferred from output token distribution after many queries.
vulnerability.generated: Watermark patterns become statistically distinguishable through repeated API outputs, enabling reverse-engineering without detection.

impact.reference: Undetectable AI-generated disinformation erodes trust in digital content provenance.
impact.generated: Undetectable AI-generated content facilitates deception at scale, eroding trust in provenance tracking systems.

dose_response.reference: LLM watermark stealing attacks enable key inference from API outputs, defeating providers' tracking and allowing undetectable AI disinformation that erodes provenance trust.
dose_response.generated: LLM watermarking's vulnerability to attacks exploiting algorithmic weaknesses, through repeated API queries, triggers statistically distinguishable patterns enabling reverse-engineering, leading to undetectable AI content that erodes trust in provenance tracking.
